item.title: 不止折叠屏，曝苹果未来数年将推出十大新品类
item.guid: 不止折叠屏，曝苹果未来数年将推出十大新品类
item.description:
Yesterday, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman revealed in the latest edition of his PowerOn column that Apple plans to launch about 10 new product categories over the next few years, spanning smart home, AI wearables, and other hardware fields. The first to arrive will be the foldable iPhone, set to be released this September. 昨天，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 在最新一期的 PowerOn 专栏中透露，未来数年内，苹果计划推出约 10 个全新产品品类，横跨智能家居、AI 穿戴设备及其他硬件领域。而首个到来的，正是今年 9 月即将发布的折叠屏 iPhone。

John Ternus will officially take over as CEO on September 1st this year, and will host the launch of this product less than two weeks later. Gurman stated that Apple, in planning the transition, intentionally wants the new leader to personally stand on stage, making them the "spokesperson" for this new product category. John Ternus 将于今年 9 月 1 日正式接任 CEO，不到两周后便将主持发布这款产品。Gurman 称，苹果在规划交接过渡时，有意让新任领导者亲自站台，使其成为这一新品类的「代言人」。

It is reported that the development of the foldable iPhone is led by Ternus, focusing on durability, performance, shallower creases, and an internal screen with an iPad-like ratio, with an estimated price of over $2000 . 据悉，折叠屏 iPhone 的研发由 Ternus 主导，主打耐用性、性能、更浅的折痕以及接近 iPad 比例的内屏， 售价预计将达 2000 美元以上 。

The report also points out that the foldable iPhone will bring a "tailwind" to Ternus's reputation and revenue after taking over the company; at the same time, it will also use this to showcase its own product style. 报道还指出，折叠屏 iPhone 还将为 Ternus 的声量以及接手公司后的营收带来「顺风局」；同时其还将借此展示反映自身的产品风格。

    Smart home directions include HomePods with screens, desktop robots equipped with movable robotic arms, and home security devices that rival Ring and Google Nest;

    AI camera wearables include smart glasses competing with Meta Ray-Ban, AI AirPods with built-in low-resolution cameras, and AI pendants that can be worn as necklaces or brooches;

    Additionally, Apple is also developing touchscreen Macs (expected to launch by the end of this year or early next year), AR glasses planned for release between 2028 and 2030, and an approximately 20-inch foldable iPad.

Ternus stated at a recent all-hands employee meeting that Apple is about to "change the world" and called the current product lineup "the most exciting" of his career. Ternus 在近期的员工全员大会上表示，苹果即将「改变世界」，并称目前的产品线是他职业生涯中「最令人兴奋的」。

item.title: DeepSeek V4 成龙虾默认模型，输入 token 缓存命中价格降至 1/10
item.guid: DeepSeek-V4-成龙虾默认模型，输入-token-缓存命中价格降至-1/10
item.description:
Recently, OpenClaw "Lobster" officially released its 2026.4.24 version update, integrating the DeepSeek V4 series models, with DeepSeek V4-Flash set as the default preferred model for new users. 日前，OpenClaw「龙虾」正式发布 2026.4.24 版本更新，接入 DeepSeek V4 系列模型，DeepSeek V4-Flash 更是被设为新用户的默认首选模型。

Meanwhile, DeepSeek officially updated its API documentation, announcing a price reduction for all DeepSeek API services, with the price for input cache hits dropping to 1/10 of the original price , and Pro models receiving an additional 75% off limited-time discount before May 5, 2026. 与此同时，DeepSeek 官方也更新了 API 文档，宣布下调 DeepSeek 全系列 API 服务的价格， 输入缓存命中的价格降至原有价格的 1/10 ，Pro 模型在 2026 年 5 月 5 日前叠加 2.5 折限时优惠。

After the price adjustment, the DeepSeek-V4-Pro model input (cache hit) is reduced to 0.025 yuan / million Tokens, and DeepSeek-V4-Flash input (cache hit) is reduced to 0.02 yuan / million Tokens. 调价后，DeepSeek-V4-Pro 模型输入（缓存命中）降低至 0.025 元 / 百万 Token，DeepSeek-V4-Flash 输入（缓存命中）降低至 0.02 元 / 百万 Token。

item.title: 内存涨疯了，三星手机部门面临史上首次亏损
item.guid: 内存涨疯了，三星手机部门面临史上首次亏损
item.description:
According to South Korean media "Money Today," Samsung's MX (Mobile eXperience) division is facing the risk of its first annual loss, as the AI industry's large-scale acquisition of low-power LPDDR memory is pushing the smartphone industry into a rare cost crisis. 据韩国《今日货币》报道，三星 MX（移动体验）事业部正首次面临全年亏损的风险，原因是 AI 产业对低功耗内存 LPDDR 的大规模抢占，正将智能手机行业推入一场罕见的成本危机。

Roh Tae-moon, head of Samsung's MX division, recently conveyed to management his concerns about the "possibility of an annual loss for the MX division." If this expectation comes true, it would be the first annual loss for Samsung's MX division since its establishment. 三星 MX 事业部负责人卢泰文近期已向管理层传达了对「MX 事业部出现年度亏损可能性」的担忧。若这一预期成真，将是三星 MX 事业部自成立以来的首次全年亏损。

The root of this crisis lies in the complete disruption of the LPDDR supply and demand structure by the AI industry — a single Nvidia AI supercomputer "Vera Rubin NVL72" consumes LPDDR5X memory equivalent to the total usage of approximately 4600 Galaxy S26 Ultra phones, and Tesla's new generation AI chips also plan to adopt LPDDR. 这场危机的根源在于 LPDDR 供需结构被 AI 产业彻底打乱 —— 英伟达 AI 超算「Vera Rubin NVL72」单台消耗的 LPDDR5X 内存，相当于约 4600 部 Galaxy S26 Ultra 的总用量，特斯拉新一代 AI 芯片同样计划采用 LPDDR。

Industry insiders stated: "The AI industry has absorbed mobile memory, making it difficult for phone manufacturers to even secure supply, and the possibility of further price increases in the second half of the year is quite high." 有行业人士表示：「AI 产业已将移动端内存一并吸纳，手机厂商连货源都难以保障，下半年售价进一步上涨的可能性相当大。」

🔗 Related reading: Samsung memory is impartial, Samsung phones forced into losses 🔗 相关阅读： 三星内存铁面无私，三星手机被迫亏损

item.title: 雷军车展送同行定制 T 恤走红，小米回应：暂时不卖
item.guid: 雷军车展送同行定制-T-恤走红，小米回应：暂时不卖
item.description:
Recently, Xiaomi responded in "Xiaomi Auto Q&A with Netizens" that the custom T-shirts Lei Jun gave to fellow car manufacturers during this year's Beijing Auto Show "currently have no plans for public sale," and stated that these cultural shirts were "Mr. Lei's gifts for his industry friends." 日前，小米在「小米汽车答网友问」中回应称，雷军在今年北京车展期间赠送给车企同行的定制 T 恤「暂无公开发售的打算」，并表示该批文化衫是「雷总为同行朋友们准备的礼物」。

Previously, Lei Jun visited the booths of BYD, Xpeng Motors, Li Auto, Nio, and other companies during the auto show, presenting custom T-shirts printed with his iconic golden phrases to each CEO. 此前，雷军在车展期间先后到访比亚迪、小鹏汽车、理想汽车、蔚来等展台，向各家 CEO 赠送了印有其标志性金句的定制 T 恤。

Li Xiang corresponded to "Let me finish," He Xiaopeng to "All good Peng-friends," Li Bin to "Let's power up together," and Wang Chuanfu to "Together, that's Chinese automotive." This move sparked widespread discussion online, with many netizens expressing a desire to buy the same items. 李想对应「听我讲完」，何小鹏对应「都是好鹏友」，李斌对应「一起加电」，王传福对应「在一起，才是中国汽车」。这一举动在网络上引发广泛讨论，不少网友表示希望购买同款。

item.title: 「雷军被围堵维权」造谣者被抓
item.guid: 「雷军被围堵维权」造谣者被抓
item.description:
According to the "National Business Daily," videos and related information circulating online recently, claiming "Lei Jun was surrounded by car owners demanding rights at a service area," sparked widespread media reposts and public discussion. Insiders revealed that the rumor-monger, Li Mouhua, has been legally sentenced to ten days of administrative detention by public security organs and ordered to issue a written apology. 据《每日经济新闻》报道，近日网络流传「雷军在某服务区被车主围堵维权」的视频及相关信息，引发大量媒体转载和网民讨论。知情人士透露，造谣者李某华已被公安机关依法处以行政拘留十日，并被责令书面道歉。

It is reported that on April 18, Li Mouhua sent photos and videos related to Xiaomi Auto in a WeChat group via mobile phone, publishing false information without verifying the facts, which ultimately led to thousands of reposts by multiple media outlets and comments from netizens. He confessed to intentionally spreading rumors and disrupting public order. 据悉，李某华于 4 月 18 日通过手机在微信群中发送小米汽车相关照片及视频，在未经核实真实情况的前提下发表不实信息，最终造成多家媒体转载、网民评论数千条。其对故意散布谣言、扰乱公共秩序的违法行为供认不讳。

Yesterday, a Xiaomi company spokesperson officially responded, confirming that after the company reported the incident to the police, public security organs quickly intervened and apprehended the rumor-monger, emphasizing that "the internet is not beyond the law" and that they will continue to defend Xiaomi's and Lei Jun's reputation through legal means against acts of deliberate defamation. 昨天，小米公司发言人正式回应，确认公司报警后公安机关迅速介入并抓获造谣者，并强调「网络不是法外之地」，对于蓄意抹黑小米及雷军声誉的行为，将持续通过法律手段维权。

item.title: 东方甄选「F4」全部出走，俞敏洪公开致歉承认管理失当
item.guid: 东方甄选「F4」全部出走，俞敏洪公开致歉承认管理失当
item.description:
According to The Paper, Yu Minhong recently publicly apologized during a live broadcast regarding the collective departure of Oriental Selection's core anchors. He admitted that after management adjustments, the company "overly focused on institutional control and neglected humanistic care for the team, leading to problems with team atmosphere," and stated that he would comprehensively review internal management and optimize operating models. 据澎湃新闻报道，针对东方甄选核心主播集体离职一事，俞敏洪近日在直播中公开致歉，承认管理层调整后公司「过度侧重制度管控，忽视团队人文关怀，导致团队氛围出现问题」，并表示将全面复盘内部管理、优化运营模式。

He also emphasized that this personnel change will not affect the platform's daily operations. 他同时强调，此次人事变动不会影响平台日常运营。

The incident stemmed from a wave of anchor departures since April this year. Dong Yuhui, Dundun, Mingming, and Tianquan, once known by fans as the "F4" live streaming group, have all left Oriental Selection. Anchors Zhong Can and Linlin have also successively publicly responded to their departures. 事件起因于今年 4 月以来的主播离职潮。曾被粉丝称为「F4」直播组合的董宇辉、顿顿、明明、天权四人已全部离开东方甄选，主播中灿、林林亦相继公开回应离职。

    Tianquan stated in his declaration that over the past four months, the company's "executive management has changed, some philosophies have changed, and the live stream's style has changed." His idealism "often seemed out of place," and the value he created "did not seem to match the company's needs," leading him to choose to leave;

    Mingming, on the other hand, stated frankly that the new management was "unfriendly" to her, causing her to fall into "severe anxiety and internal struggle," and to suffer a "quiet isolation" — no arguments, no conflicts, yet she was pushed to an increasingly marginalized position. She spent a total of 1571 days at Oriental Selection.

item.title: 摩尔线程一季度首次扭亏为盈，营收 7.38 亿同比增长逾 155%
item.guid: 摩尔线程一季度首次扭亏为盈，营收-7.38-亿同比增长逾-155%
item.description:
Moore Threads yesterday released its first-quarter financial report for this year. The "first domestic GPU stock" achieved single-quarter profitability for the first time since its listing, and its revenue scale more than doubled compared to the same period last year. The main driver of this significant revenue growth was the scaled implementation of the company's new full-featured GPU products. 摩尔线程昨日发布今年第一季度财报，「国产 GPU 第一股」自上市以来首次实现单季度盈利，营收规模亦较去年同期实现翻倍以上增长，收入大幅增长的主要驱动力，是公司全功能 GPU 新产品的规模化落地。

Operating revenue was 738 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 155.35%; net profit attributable to shareholders of listed companies was 29.3592 million yuan, turning losses into profits year-on-year; total profit was 30.8799 million yuan.

However, in terms of profit structure, this turnaround was to some extent dependent on non-recurring gains — after deducting non-recurring gains and losses, the net loss was still 54.2822 million yuan, with government subsidies contributing approximately 70.0638 million yuan in non-recurring gains. 不过，在盈利结构上，此次扭亏在一定程度上依赖非经常性收益 —— 扣除非经常性损益后，净亏损仍为 5428.22 万元，其中政府补助贡献了约 7006.38 万元的非经常性收益。

    R&D investment was 369 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 49.95%, accounting for 50.03% of operating revenue;

    Operating costs were 241 million yuan, a significant year-on-year increase, and the gross profit margin structure improved;

    Sales expenses were 76.4389 million yuan, an increase of approximately 141% year-on-year, largely matching the pace of revenue expansion;

    Cash flow from operating activities was -1.487 billion yuan, mainly due to a significant increase in operating procurement expenditures caused by expanding production scale;

    Basic earnings per share were 0.06 yuan, compared to -0.28 yuan in the same period last year.

item.title: 京东启动 AI 硬件孵化计划「Aidol 创造营」
item.guid: 京东启动-AI-硬件孵化计划「Aidol-创造营」
item.description:
JD.com yesterday officially launched the "Aidol Creation Camp" AI hardware incubation program, soliciting AI smart hardware projects globally, with the goal of jointly incubating 101 benchmark AI hardware products with industry partners this year. 京东昨日正式启动「Aidol 创造营」AI 硬件孵化计划，面向全球征集 AI 智能硬件项目，目标是在今年联合产业伙伴共同孵化 101 个 AI 硬件标杆。

The recruitment targets include global AI innovation brands, startup teams, hardware makers, independent developers, and university research laboratories, with no thresholds for company size or historical sales data, focusing solely on product innovation and user experience value. Selected projects will receive five core supports: 招募对象涵盖全球 AI 创新品牌、初创团队、硬件创客、独立开发者及高校科研实验室，无企业规模或历史销售数据门槛，只看产品创新力与用户体验价值。入选项目将获得五大核心支持：

    Capital : Direct access to top investment institutions, with outstanding projects showcased at global industry events;

    Sales : Full-chain exclusive sales, covering the entire lifecycle from crowd-testing and crowdfunding, mass production launch, to logistics and after-sales, and receiving special support from the "Novelty Market" channel;

    Technology : Free access to the JoyInside platform, providing AI capabilities such as speech, semantics, and edge-side inference based on the JoyAI large model;

    Global Expansion : Joybuy's one-stop cross-border solution, connecting with consumer electronics giant Mediamarkt, covering logistics, customs clearance, compliance, and localized operations;

    Offline Presence : Entry into JD MALLs nationwide and over 4500 JD Home AI zones, enhancing user perception through displays and pop-up events.

item.title: 澳大利亚未成年人社交媒体禁令形同虚设，六成青少年仍在「照刷不误」
item.guid: 澳大利亚未成年人社交媒体禁令形同虚设，六成青少年仍在「照刷不误」
item.description:
According to Fortune, Australia officially implemented a social media ban for minors under 16 last December, but the latest survey shows that the actual implementation effect of the ban is far from ideal. 据《财富》报道，澳大利亚于去年 12 月正式实施针对 16 岁以下未成年人的社交媒体禁令，但最新调查显示，该禁令的实际执行效果远不理想。

The UK suicide prevention organization Molly Rose Foundation surveyed 1050 Australian teenagers aged between 12 and 15 last month, and the results showed that over 60% of teenagers who already had social media accounts before the ban was implemented can still access at least one platform normally. 英国自杀预防机构 Molly Rose Foundation 上月对 1050 名年龄在 12 至 15 岁之间的澳大利亚青少年展开调查，结果显示超过 60% 在禁令实施前已拥有社交媒体账号的青少年，目前仍能正常访问至少一个平台。

TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram all retained over half of their underage users, and about two-thirds of respondents stated that these platforms "did not take any action" on their existing accounts.

Teenagers are bypassing the ban in various ways. A 14-year-old girl said she plans to use her mother's facial recognition to log into Snapchat and Instagram; in a related Reddit discussion thread, a user suggested buying mesh masks sold on Temu to trick the app's facial recognition system. 青少年绕过禁令的方式五花八门。一名年仅 14 岁的女孩表示，她计划借用母亲的面部识别功能登录 Snapchat 和 Instagram；在 Reddit 相关讨论帖中，有用户建议购买 Temu 上出售的网格面具来欺骗应用程序的人脸识别系统。

In response to these chaotic situations, Australia's internet regulator has announced an investigation into five major social media platforms to assess whether they have violated the ban. 面对上述乱象，澳大利亚互联网监管机构已宣布对五大社交媒体平台展开调查，评估其是否存在违反禁令的行为。

item.title: 💡 美联储研究：自 ChatGPT 上线以来，美国编程岗位三年少了 50 万
item.guid: 💡-美联储研究：自-ChatGPT-上线以来，美国编程岗位三年少了-50-万
item.description:
According to The Decoder, a working paper recently published by the Federal Reserve Board shows that since ChatGPT went online in November 2022, the growth rate of employment in programming-related positions in the United States has nearly halved. 据 The Decoder 报道，美联储理事会日前发布的一项工作论文显示，自 2022 年 11 月 ChatGPT 上线以来，美国编程相关岗位的就业增速已近乎腰斩。

The research team cross-referenced the Department of Labor's occupational database with household employment surveys to identify programming-intensive jobs, which account for about 3.7% of the total US workforce. Before ChatGPT's launch, the annual growth rate for such positions was close to 5%; after its launch, it sharply declined, and employment growth in the IT services and software development industries has nearly stalled. 研究团队将劳工部职业数据库与住户就业调查交叉比对，锁定约占全美劳动力 3.7% 的编程密集型岗位。ChatGPT 上线前，此类岗位年增速接近 5%；上线后急剧下滑，IT 服务与软件开发行业就业增长几近停滞。

After constructing a "counterfactual employment curve" to exclude macroeconomic interference, researchers found that programmer employment is still contracting at a rate of about 3 percentage points per year — companies are actively reducing the proportion of programming positions, with a cumulative gap of approximately 500,000 jobs over three years . 研究者构建「反事实就业曲线」排除宏观干扰后发现，程序员就业仍以每年约 3 个百分点的速度收缩 —— 企业正在主动压缩编程岗位占比， 三年累计缺口约达 50 万个岗位 。

"The employment gap will not significantly widen until mid-2024, suggesting that companies need sufficient time to observe the actual improvement in model capabilities before translating it into recruitment reduction decisions."

The study also points out that programmer salaries have not seen a significant decline currently, with the impact mainly reflected in the number of positions. The authors also cautiously emphasize that a 500,000 gap does not equate to 500,000 people losing their jobs , and changes in tax policies other than AI could also be confounding variables. 研究同时指出，目前程序员薪资并未出现明显下滑，冲击主要体现在岗位数量层面。作者也审慎强调， 50 万缺口不等同于 50 万人失业 ，AI 之外的税务政策变化亦可能是干扰变量。

📄 Full report: federalreserve.gov/econres/feds/files/2026018pap.pdf 📄 报告全文：federalreserve.gov/econres/feds/files/2026018pap.pdf

item.title: 何小鹏：小鹏人形机器人今年底中国量产
item.guid: 何小鹏：小鹏人形机器人今年底中国量产
item.description:
According to Sina Tech, during the 2026 Beijing Auto Show, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of XPeng Group, stated that XPeng will launch a new generation of "automotive-grade, humanoid, high-level" humanoid robots in the third quarter of this year, with plans for mass production in China by the end of this year and delivery in more countries next year. 据新浪科技报道，在 2026 北京车展期间，小鹏集团董事长兼 CEO 何小鹏表示，小鹏今年第三季度将推出新一代「车规级、拟人、高等级」人形机器人，计划今年底在中国实现量产，并于明年在更多国家开展交付。

He also specifically mentioned that the robot's hands support quick replacement, which can be completed within 20 seconds, allowing it to perform both precision operations and heavy physical labor. In terms of commercialization strategy, XPeng has determined the deployment order of "first commercial, then industrial, then home." 他还特别提到，该机器人手部支持快速更换，20 秒内即可完成拆换，使其既能胜任精密操作，也能承担重体力劳动。在商业化策略上，小鹏确定了「先商业、再工业、再家庭」的落地顺序。

He Xiaopeng revealed that the target scenario for the first phase is store sales assistants — robots will have basic walking and language capabilities, operate offline with local computing power, learn store-specific knowledge and form skills, and multiple robots can achieve seamless replication and collaboration. 何小鹏透露，第一阶段的目标场景是门店销售员——机器人具备基础行走与语言能力，无需联网、本地具备算力，可学习门店专属知识并形成技能，多台机器人之间还能实现无缝复制与协作。

Regarding a longer-term vision, He Xiaopeng stated that he hopes XPeng robots will not only be able to handle household chores like cooking and cleaning in the future but also become "life partners, family partners, and work partners" for humans, ultimately expanding from China to the global market. 对于更长远的愿景，何小鹏表示，希望小鹏机器人未来不仅能承担炒菜、清洁等家务，更能成为人类的「生活伙伴、家庭伙伴、工作伙伴」，并最终从中国走向全球市场。

item.title: 阿里云上线 Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro，支持多语言文字渲染
item.guid: 阿里云上线-Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro，支持多语言文字渲染
item.description:
Alibaba Cloud Bailian Platform officially launched Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro, which is officially claimed to be the "full-blooded version" model of the Qwen-Image-2.0 series, with a significant leap in image quality, especially in texture details, lighting, and materials. 阿里云百炼平台正式上线 Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro，官方宣称其为 Qwen-Image-2.0 系列「满血版」模型，在画面质感，尤其是纹理细节、光影、材质上有明显跃升。

This model integrates text-to-image generation and image editing into the same framework, allowing users to directly modify objects, text, styles, and other elements in images through natural language instructions. 该模型将文生图与图像编辑整合进同一框架，用户可通过自然语言指令直接对图片中的物体、文字、风格等元素进行修改。

The model's text rendering capability has also been extended from English to multi-language support, with specific improvements made to address common text garbling issues in AI-generated image scenarios. Additionally, the model's semantic adherence capability has been further enhanced, supporting up to 2K resolution output, with API call pricing at $0.075 per image. 该模型的文字渲染能力也从英文扩展至多语言支持，针对 AI 生图场景中常见的文字乱码问题进行了专项改善。此外，模型的语义遵循能力进一步增强，支持最高 2K 分辨率输出，API 调用定价为 0.075 美元/张。

item.title: 开源增量数据引擎 CocoIndex V1 上线
item.guid: 开源增量数据引擎-CocoIndex-V1-上线
item.description:
The open-source data framework CocoIndex officially released its V1 version yesterday, with a complete rewrite of its underlying engine. CocoIndex aims to help AI agents continuously convert data sources such as codebases, documents, and PDFs into directly queryable structured contexts. New features include: 开源数据框架 CocoIndex 昨天正式发布 V1 版本，对底层引擎进行了完整重写。CocoIndex 旨在帮助 AI 智能体将代码库、文档、PDF 等数据源持续转换为可直接查询的结构化上下文。新版特性如下：

    Proprietary configuration language removed : Previously, a dedicated API was needed to describe data flows. V1 now allows writing ordinary Python functions directly, enabling breakpoints and unit tests, and the engine automatically tracks which parts have changed and only re-runs those parts;

    Removed the mandatory dependency on Postgres : V0 required setting up a Postgres instance before running, while V1 uses local embedded storage, allowing direct operation after pip install cocoindex .

The underlying engine is still implemented in Rust, with the protocol being Apache 2.0. Data can be exported to over a dozen target storages, including Postgres (with vector extensions), LanceDB, Neo4j, Kafka, and S3. 底层引擎仍以 Rust 实现，协议为 Apache 2.0。数据可输出至 Postgres（含向量扩展）、LanceDB、Neo4j、Kafka、S3 等十余种目标存储。

item.title: 美团小象超市全面暂停自提服务，不满 35 元要多付 3 元配送费
item.guid: 美团小象超市全面暂停自提服务，不满-35-元要多付-3-元配送费
item.description:
According to Jiupai News, Meituan Xiaoxiang Supermarket has suspended in-store pickup services at most of its nationwide locations, with users only able to choose home delivery after placing an order. 据九派新闻报道，美团小象超市在全国大部分站点暂停到站自提服务，用户下单后仅能选择配送上门。

In response, Xiaoxiang Supermarket's official customer service stated that this adjustment is to "optimize delivery service experience and improve logistics efficiency." The platform is comprehensively upgrading its delivery system and will concentrate resources to provide users with faster and more stable delivery services. 对此，小象超市官方客服回应称，此次调整是为了「优化配送服务体验、提升物流效率」，平台正全面升级配送体系，并将集中资源为用户提供更快捷、稳定 的配送服务。

According to current rules, orders under 35 yuan require an additional 3 yuan delivery fee. Furthermore, some stations in Beijing and Guangdong that have not yet suspended self-pickup services have added a minimum spending threshold of "20 yuan for self-pickup." 按现行规则，订单金额不足 35 元即需额外支付 3 元配送费。此外，北京及广东部分暂未关停自提功能的站点，也新增了「需满 20 元才能自提」的最低消费门槛。

Customer service further revealed that stations currently retaining self-pickup services might also gradually suspend them in the future, suggesting that self-pickup services may be phased out entirely. 客服进一步透露，目前仍保留自提服务的站点，未来也可能陆续暂停，自提服务或将全面退出。

item.title: 花呗白条等「信用支付」迎来系统性整改：贷款产品须与支付工具严格区隔
item.guid: 花呗白条等「信用支付」迎来系统性整改：贷款产品须与支付工具严格区隔
item.description:
According to Yicai Global, eight departments including the People's Bank of China recently jointly issued the "Administrative Measures for Online Marketing of Financial Products," which will officially take effect on September 30. 据第一财经报道，中国人民银行等八部门近日联合印发《金融产品网络营销管理办法》，9 月 30 日起正式施行。

The core requirement of the new regulations is that non-bank payment institutions must not include financial products such as loans and asset management products in payment tool options, nor provide marketing services for them. 新规核心要求：非银行支付机构不得将贷款、资产管理产品等金融产品列入支付工具选项，也不得为其提供营销服务。

    The checkout page must display payment tools and loan products separately and prioritize their display, and must not confuse the two types of products with terms like "discounted payment" or "installment payment";

    Loan products must not use marketing language such as "low threshold," "instant approval," or "low interest rates";

    Must not induce installment consumption through one-sided promotion of first-period fee discounts or similar methods;

    Operations such as default selection, pop-up pushes, and upfront recommendations are explicitly prohibited.

Dong Ximiao, Chief Economist at Zhaolian, stated that "credit payment" products like Huabei, Baitiao, and Yuefu will face significant adjustments. Wang Pengbo, Chief Analyst at Botong Consulting, believes that the new regulations have completely ended the mainstream business model of "payment scenarios driving financial monetization" that has existed for over a decade. 招联首席经济学家董希淼表示，花呗、白条、月付等「信用支付」类产品将面临重大调整。博通咨询首席分析师王蓬博认为，新规彻底终结了过去十余年「支付场景引流金融变现」的主流商业模式。

item.title: 支付宝小荷包上线「承诺券」，让约定有了「押金」
item.guid: 支付宝小荷包上线「承诺券」，让约定有了「押金」
item.description:
Alipay's Xiaohobao officially launched the "Commitment Voucher" feature yesterday. Users can create commitment vouchers under any name in Xiaohobao, transfer a commitment fund, and then send it to a partner, friend, family member, or companion, thereby expressing an invitation and commitment to "do something together with the other party." 支付宝小荷包昨日正式上线「承诺券」功能。用户可在小荷包中创建任意名义的承诺券，并转入一笔承诺金，再将其发送给对象、朋友、家人或搭子，以此表达「想和对方一起做某件事」的邀请与承诺。

The content of commitment vouchers can be freely created, covering various scenarios such as "weekend feast," "travel together," "reconciliation after a cold war," and "fitness supervision." 承诺券的内容可自由创作，涵盖「周末吃大餐」「一起旅行」「冷战和好」「健身监督」等各类场景。

Regarding the fund mechanism, the amount transferred into Xiaohobao will be accounted for equally under both parties' names. Any member with fund access within the Xiaohobao can use it, but this does not affect their individual account balances. A commitment voucher can only be sent to one member, and the redemption time is freely agreed upon by both parties. 在资金机制上，转入小荷包的金额将以一人一半的方式记账至双方名下，荷包内有资金权限的成员均可使用，但不影响各自的记账结余。一张承诺券仅限发送给一位成员，兑现时间由双方自由约定。

item.title: 《迈克尔 · 杰克逊：巨星之路》大陆票房破 3000 万，观众口碑「逆风翻盘」
item.guid: 《迈克尔-·-杰克逊：巨星之路》大陆票房破-3000-万，观众口碑「逆风翻盘」
item.description:
According to Maoyan Movie data, the Michael Jackson biopic "Michael Jackson: The Road to Stardom" has surpassed 30 million in total box office revenue in mainland cinemas within 3 days of its release. 据猫眼电影数据，迈克尔·杰克逊传记电影《迈克尔·杰克逊：巨星之路》上映 3 天，大陆院线总票房已突破 3000 万。

According to The Hollywood Reporter, in the North American market, the film's opening weekend box office approached $90 million, easily breaking the North American opening record for a music biopic, surpassing Universal Pictures' previous release "Straight Outta Compton" ($60.1 million) and 20th Century Fox's "Bohemian Rhapsody" ($55 million). 另据《好莱坞报道》，在北美市场，影片首映票房接近 9000 万美元，轻松打破音乐传记片北美开画纪录，超越此前由环球影业发行的《冲出康普顿》（6010 万美元）以及福克斯影业发行的《波西米亚狂想曲》（5500 万美元）。

It is worth noting that the film faced considerable skepticism in the early stages of its review embargo — IGN scored it only 3 points, and Rotten Tomatoes critics' freshness rating was only 38%. 值得注意的是，这部影片在口碑解禁初期遭遇不小的质疑 —— IGN 评分仅 3 分，烂番茄影评人新鲜度也仅为 38%。

After its official release, audience reactions far exceeded expectations. The Rotten Tomatoes Audience Score (Popcornmeter) has been pushed up to 97%, a stark contrast to the critics' ratings, and the CinemaScore audience grade reached A-. 正式公映后，观众反应远超预期。烂番茄观众指数（Popcornmeter）已被推高至 97%，与影评人评分形成鲜明反差，CinemaScore 观众口碑评级达到 A-。

item.title: 《纵横四海》4K 修复版定档 5 月 3 日
item.description:
The 4K high-definition restored version of the classic Hong Kong film "Once a Thief" has officially announced its release date, set to hit cinemas nationwide on May 3rd. The film will also have preview screenings in Guangdong Province from May 1st to 2nd, between 14:00 and 21:00. This film will be released in both Mandarin and Cantonese versions. 经典港片《纵横四海》4K 高清修复版正式宣布定档，将于 5 月 3 日登陆全国院线。影片还将于 5 月 1 日至 2 日 14:00~21:00 在广东省率先展开点映活动。本片将以普通话、粤语双版本上映。

"Once a Thief," directed by John Woo and starring Chow Yun-fat, Leslie Cheung, and Cherie Chung, was released in 1991. This mainland release marks the film's debut on the big screen in mainland China, 35 years after its original release. 《纵横四海》由吴宇森执导，周润发、张国荣、钟楚红领衔主演，于 1991 年问世，此次内地公映是该片首度登上内地大银幕，距离影片上映已相隔 35 年。

The film tells the story of three orphans raised by their adoptive father to become international thieves, experiencing life and death, betrayal, and revenge. It integrates elements of gunfights, action, comedy, and dance, with a Douban rating of 8.8. 影片讲述三位孤儿被养父培养为国际大盗，历经生死、背叛与复仇的故事，将枪战、动作、喜剧、舞蹈等元素融为一体，豆瓣评分 8.8。

item.title: 《福尔摩斯小姐 3》7 月 1 日上线 Netflix
item.description:
According to What's on Netflix, the Netflix detective action-adventure film "Enola Holmes 3" has officially been scheduled for release on July 1st this year. 据 What‘s on Netflix 报道，Netflix 探案动作冒险片《福尔摩斯小姐 3》已正式定档，将于今年 7 月 1 日上线。

The official Netflix synopsis reveals that this adventure will take Enola to Malta, where she will face a mystery more complex and perilous than any previous case, and where personal and professional choices will intersect and collide. Netflix 官方公布的剧情简介显示，这一次冒险将把伊诺拉带到马耳他，她将在那里面对一桩比以往任何案件都更为复杂险峻的谜题，个人与职业的抉择也将在此交汇碰撞。
